title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider LLM workflows using Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 in different roles (planner vs. implementer) across real GitHub issues. Using Archon, he evaluated 12 pull requests on seven dimensions to determine the optimal provider allocation for coding tasks.
